audit_60_more_round_methodology: A. Property-based (R51-55): sort stable, count equiv, deep roster eq, phases length range, invariant subset
B. Differential vs spec (R56-60): brief v1.3 check, foundation R84 7-pillar, cultural ban list, R86 element canonical, R86 path canonical
C. Cross-file consistency (R61-65): full vs named/generic, ai_bt mirror, status vs actual, by_path mirror
D. Schema vs data (R66-70): SQL columns ↔ JSONL keys, SQL types, NOT NULL fields, UNIQUE name+era, ai_bt JSON serializable
E. R85 historical semantic (R71-75): viet_anhhung/yeumotruyen/ngoai_xam keywords, Trần Hưng Đạo specifics, Quang Trung specifics
F. Numerical bounds (R76-80): stat_mod reasonable, hp/atk ratio, enrage feasibility, aggro_range correlation, no level underflow
G. Encoding/locale stress (R81-85): no UTF-8 BOM, NFC per field, NFD differs NFC, filename safe, Vietnamese diacritics present
H. Adversarial/fuzz (R86-90): no SQL meta in names, no newline in strings, name length reasonable, no empty required, no int overflow
I. Idempotent (R91-95): full rebuild byte identical, UUID collision, named UUID seed, JSON key order, BT dump stable
J. Transport/storage (R96-100): file size reasonable, gzip compression, line count exact, no Windows path, gz roundtrip
K. Cross-CMD foundation (R101-105): foundation v2.10 hash, v2.8 unchanged, INDEX format, roster hash, no legacy v1 files
L. Meta-audit (R106-110): round completeness, fn static check, self hash, runtime <60s, status consistent

bugs_fixed_root_cause.root_cause: Brief v1.3 file Desktop đã được Mr.Long supersede sang v2.10.0 và remove. Audit hardcoded path → false positive.
bugs_fixed_root_cause.fix_root_cause: Audit skip nếu file missing (informational, not blocking). R57 still validates against foundation v2.10.0 R84 7-pillar — that's the active spec.

bugs_fixed_root_cause.root_cause: Keyword list 16 từ quá hẹp — roster v2 historical dùng vocabulary Việt phong phú: tướng/vua/khởi/phá/chống/kháng/độc lập/Đại Việt/proper hero nouns (Lê Lợi, Trần Hưng Đạo, Bình Ngô)/era enemies (Tống/Đường/Hán)/concepts (sấm/tiên tri/trạng).
bugs_fixed_root_cause.fix_root_cause: Expand pool 16 → 60+ keywords covering full Vietnamese military/historical vocabulary.

bugs_fixed_root_cause.root_cause: Keyword list 11 từ — roster v2 dùng nhiều mythical/spiritual term: tinh (spirit), quỷ (ghost), tu hành (cultivate), specific creatures (hổ/cá/rùa/cá sấu), cõi âm/diêm la, proper names (Sơn Tinh, Hùng Vương, Tản Viên).
bugs_fixed_root_cause.fix_root_cause: Expand pool 11 → 50+ keywords covering full Vietnamese mythology + creature names + spiritual concepts + proper nouns.

output_unchanged: All bugs found were in AUDIT SCRIPT logic, NOT in v1.4.1 output. boss_full.jsonl + all artifacts unchanged from v1.4.1.
